comments.author: @PolishChannel-g8l
comments.text: This looks super interesting! I love how Spain mixes old and new. Makes me think about how places change over time. What do you think keeps that balance?

comments.author: @UtopiaPlaneTv
comments.text: Spain has done a better job balancing tradition and modernity than most countries.

comments.text: One day I'm in Argentina and the next day I'm in Spain! Technology, ya gotta Love it. Thanks again, TOUR GUIDE. ✨💖✨
